name: ConvertKit
description: ConvertKit (now Kit) is an email marketing platform built for creators. Use it to manage subscribers, send broadcasts, build automations with sequences, and organize your audience with tags and forms.

capabilities.name: list_subscribers
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all subscribers in your account. Supports filtering by tag, status, and date range.

capabilities.name: create_subscriber
capabilities.description: Add a new subscriber to your ConvertKit account. Acts as an upsert -- if the email already exists, it updates the existing record.

capabilities.name: send_broadcast
capabilities.description: Create and optionally schedule a broadcast email to your subscribers. Supports HTML content, subject lines, and audience filtering.

capabilities.name: list_tags
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tags in your ConvertKit account. Tags are used to segment subscribers by interest, behavior, or source.

capabilities.name: tag_subscriber
capabilities.description: Apply a tag to a specific subscriber. Tags help you segment your audience for targeted broadcasts and automations.

capabilities.name: list_sequences
capabilities.description: Retrieve all email sequences (automated drip campaigns) in your account. Returns sequence name, status, and subscriber count.

capabilities.name: add_subscriber_to_sequence
capabilities.description: Enroll a subscriber into an automated email sequence. The subscriber will begin receiving the sequence emails from the start.

capabilities.name: get_broadcast_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve engagement statistics for a sent broadcast including open rate, click rate, unsubscribes, and total recipients.
